content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market opens with mild weakness across indices (Nifty -0.38%, BankNifty -0.47%) following soft US close (S&P -0.38%). VIX at 16.62 elevated. Book is +1.38% on the day with broad-based unrealized gains across 11 holdings — focus this tick is trailing SLs on winners to lock in gains, not adding new exposure given mixed pre-market tone and the fact that book is already 54% deployed with strong embedded performance.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1037.92,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — position +7.6%, SL 1037.92 already comfortably above entry (locked +5.5%) and well below CMP 1059.10 (~2% trail gap, healthy). Q4 was strong (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). Doji + bearish engulfing in last 2 sessions suggests consolidation after vertical 30% one-month rally; not tightening further to avoid forced exit on noise. Target 1110 still ~5% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5% drawdown, SL 121 intact (~2.7% below CMP). Defensive gold exposure remains valid given geopolitical backdrop and INR weakness. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current stored SL 1735 is ABOVE entry 1700 AND only 0.3% below CMP 1740.40 — that violates the 1% trail-gap rule and risks self-stopout on normal noise. Loosening SL would be REJECTED by guardrails (SL can only be tightened). Cannot fix without EXIT+re-entry. Leaving stored SL untouched (no-op MODIFY would be wasted) — flagging for HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY: stored SL 1735 cannot be loosened. Position +2.4%, fresh ATH 1757.40 hit, BULLISH research (Capital Group anchor buyer, marine +134%, dividend Jun 12). Tight 0.3% SL gap means likely stopout on any pullback — accepting that as the cost; if it stops, breakeven+ exit. Will not pre-empt SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4699.10,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.8%, CMP 4794 vs stored SL 4699.10 (~2% gap, healthy). Original target 4875 nearly hit; raising target to 4900 to capture momentum into May 14 Q4 print. NOTE: May 14 board meeting is a binary catalyst — within 4 sessions, just outside Rule 11's 3-session window. Will reassess and likely trim/tighten ahead of May 13. SL at 4699 already locks +2.7% from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: stored SL 6960 = current entry+0.9%, CMP 7049 (1.3% gap, just above 1% floor). Position +2.2%, 52w high 7200 nearby. Not tightening further — gap is at the limit. HOLD intent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replacing prior MODIFY (it was no-op vs stored values). SL 6960 / target 7400 unchanged. BULLISH research intact (Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA margin 34.2%, Geojit Rs 8500). Trail gap 1.3% — within tolerance. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position barely +0.5%, SL 836 only 0.7% below CMP 842 — very tight, but loosening not allowed. Q4 results pending in May (date TBD) is a near-term binary; HSBC downgrade target to 1425 a concern. Accepting tight SL as a feature: if 836 fires, exit at near-breakeven; if it holds, position runs."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY removed. Stored SL 836 / target 900 unchanged. Naval Systems Falta brownfield expansion approval is structurally positive but Q4 print pending — won't add. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. SL 365 (1.1% below CMP), target 388 (5.1% above). BULLISH research +0.10 modifier (Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM Rs 5.91 trn, Macquarie TP 415). Just established — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, SL 815 (-2% below CMP, healthy gap), target 860. BULLISH research +0.10 (Q4 PAT +14-18%, revenue +22%, MOFSL TP 950). FMCG defensive in mixed tape. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, SL 1260 just above entry (0.1%), target 1330. BULLISH +0.10 (Q4 PAT +134%, hit 10% upper circuit May 6, brokerage TPs 1900-2200). Note: stored SL 1260 vs CMP 1279 = 1.5% gap — within tolerance. Will trail on next material up-move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5%, SL 3025 = entry, CMP 3101 (2.5% gap). May 12 concall is the binary — 2 sessions away, JUST inside Rule 11's 3-session window. Disposition: monitoring closely, will tighten or trim on May 11 EOD. For now SL at entry already caps downside to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.7%, SL 806 = entry, CMP 835.90 (3.6% gap). Bullish marubozu May 5 on strong volume. Note research modifier was -0.05 (KFINTECH outperforming, SEBI TER headwind) — lower conviction; will tighten on next strength. Today: hold to SL=entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1037.92,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.5%; trail gap ~2%, healthy. Doji/bearish engulfing recent — don't tighten into noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal drawdown, defensive. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1735 already tight (0.3% from CMP) — cannot be loosened. Accept as either breakeven+ stopout or runner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4699.10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry+2.7% locked. Will tighten further before May 14 Q4 print (binary catalyst in 4 sessions)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "1.3% trail gap, at floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL very tight (0.7% gap) — accept noise stopout risk; can't loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Just opened, let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Healthy gap, BULLISH research, FMCG defensive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, 1.5% gap. Trail when CMP advances further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "reasoning": "May 12 concall binary in 2 sessions — will tighten/trim May 11 EOD per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 806.00,
      "reasoning": "Lower-conviction (research -0.05); SL at entry caps downside, hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Active candidates rejected this tick: (1) LAURUSLABS BULLISH +0.12 — at all-time high after +6% post-Q4 rally, momentum stretched; will admit on pullback to ~1150-1170. (2) BHEL — same-name re-entry cooldown (Rule 14); recently exited, no new post-exit catalyst. (3) SOBHA — recently exited, 5-session cooldown. (4) WOCKPHARMA — 11.8x volume surge unexplained, no catalyst confirmed in research, skip until clarified. (5) KPIL +0.00 modifier and Q4 results pending May 15 (binary in 5 sessions, just outside Rule 11 but adds risk); skip. (6) HDFCBANK / TATATECH / POLYCAB / GABRIEL — not in deep-dive data sufficient to size confidence. Book is 54% deployed across 11 names with strong unrealized gains; pre-market is mildly negative; opening risk-management is the priority over fresh admits. Will reassess after first 30 min of cash session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book has 11 holdings, all green or flat, with +1.38% unrealized. Deployment 54% leaves room but the existing book has TWO binary events in next 6 sessions (HAL May 14, GRSE May 12) requiring active management. Several positions have stored SLs that are now too tight relative to CMP (ADANIPORTS 0.3% gap, TITAGARH 0.7% gap) — engine prevents loosening, so accepting noise-stopout risk on those. Per Rule 18, qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates were walked through with explicit per-name reject rationale (above). Tomorrow's priority: trim/tighten GRSE ahead of May 12 concall."
}
